name: Abas Kabato
tagline: Senior IT and Cloud Infrastructure Engineer with over seven years of experience building resilient, large-scale technology environments. Expert in DevOps-driven automation, cloud operations, and network engineering (Juniper/Cisco). Proven record improving operational efficiency by 50% and managing platforms serving 250,000+ users.
bio: Originally from Ethiopia, now calling Seattle, Washington home. Founder of Recrutas.ai, an AI-powered recruitment platform. Senior IT and Cloud Infrastructure Engineer with a robust background in DevOps automation, cloud operations, and network engineering. Led projects that have enhanced community access to digital resources.

experience.description: Building AI-powered recruitment solutions to transform how companies hire talent.

Supporting Genetec across North America. Build and maintain Microsoft 365 (Power Automate, SharePoint) automation and reporting pipelines, leverage Power BI for analytics, and lead migration to Resolver for centralized risk management and incident tracking.

Supporting MDF and IDF infrastructure across multiple Amazon sites, including Juniper SRX firewall configuration deployments, APC NetBotz firmware upgrades, Cisco switch lifecycle updates, and VLAN automation. Leading VSM/NVR server rebuilds to improve Loss Prevention investigation efficiency.

Worked on full-stack development and architecture of the ConnectWA app, serving 250K+ users across 23+ nonprofits. Supported cloud-based deployments, CI/CD pipelines via Git Actions, and performance optimization. Improved operational efficiency by 50%.

Tier 2/3 support requests via Pomeroy Technologies and TATA Consultancy. Executed IMACD workflows, endpoint hardware diagnostics, OS/application troubleshooting, data backup/migration, and VPN/network configuration.
Led software quality engineering for the Longbow Dashboard, a proprietary platform that utilizes quantitative models to achieve consistent investment results.
Worked on Azure Pipelines errors by providing tools and methods for effective error analysis.
Developed CMS-based web applications and contributed to the design and maintenance of multiple business websites in Ethiopia.

projects.name: ConnectWA App
projects.description: Full-stack development and architecture, serving 250K+ users across 23+ nonprofits.

projects.name: Longbow Dashboard
projects.description: Software quality engineering for a proprietary investment platform utilizing quantitative models.

projects.name: Azure Pipelines Error Analysis
projects.description: AZPEA project - analyzes release logs using KQL and PowerShell to identify top 10 errors and Azure resource usage.

writing.title: From idea to Google Play Store in 100 days
writing.description: Featured as the visionary tech lead managing the ConnectWA app project for Equity in Education Coalition
